title: TEKXYZ® Reflex Ball Family Pack with Counter App | Online Community for Boxing Ball, Ideal for Coordination, Punching, Stress Relief, Home Workouts & Fitness | Stocking Stuffer Gift for All Ages
features: GROW WITH TekXYZ APP - Track hits, learn skills, join global challenges, make new friends, and stay motivated with the immersive mobile game experience
REFLEXES, COORDINATION & REWARDS - Build rapid reflexes and precise coordination to enhance agility, and join online challenges to earn rewards
GREAT FAMILY WORKOUT - Bring more movement and energy to your home! This reflex training set lets everyone join in on light, fun exercise that helps sharpen coordination and keep active indoors
SO FUN YOU FORGET TIME - People enjoy fun activities while getting exercise on the side! It is enjoyable, and you don’t realize how much you’ve been training
EASY AND SAFE TO USE - It doesn’t require boxing gloves or hand wraps as the balls are very light and soft

TekXYZ Boxing Reflex Ball Talents Showcase Amazon Merchant video Where can I download and how do I use the TekXYZ App? 1. Download. Scan the code ON the box or search “TekXYZ” in the App Store or Google Play to download the App. 2. Sign up in the App. 3. Activate. Use the App to scan the App Access Pass INSIDE the box for activation. Is the TekXYZ App free? Yes. Each purchase includes a free 1-year membership. After that, features like reward events and the 1-on-1 battle mode require a subscription, but core features like sharing and solo training remain free. For updates, visit tekxyz.com
